The idea is to give three creative prompts to help someone start writing a travel journal about imaginary places.
The first prompt is to write about a place that is familiar to you.
The second prompt is to write about a place that is unfamiliar to you.
The third prompt is to write about a place that is familiar to you but is now unfamiliar to you.
